{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603240041590331E58068254ADBB382\"}"},"total":56},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7179971369202352933","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的好开心，作者能写这本书，《锦衣之下》一直以来都是我最喜欢的一部电视剧，今夏和陆大人真的很好磕，这本书接着电视剧来写的，让我们能继续看到今夏和陆大人的故事👍👍","text_exts":[{"e":19,"s":15,"text":"锦衣之下","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E9%94%A6%E8%A1%A3%E4%B9%8B%E4%B8%8B\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742841194ADBB382%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227179971369202352933%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227161046727389088802%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%94%A6%E8%A1%A3%E4%B9%8B%E4%B8%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1671717480,"group_id":"7161046727389088802","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5T7zBpQLlAnysaSld2Se9X5bDmuOBVN2cNm9Rtki8BM","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1095573924480555","user_name":"峪兔"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1095573924480555","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1740369220,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7161046727389088802","book_info":{"abstract":"路旁铺洒着数不尽的玫瑰花，就连满京城的树干上都系着无数条红绸带。道路两旁皆是维持秩序的锦衣卫，涌动的人群络绎不绝比肩接踵，伸头探脑去观望。一身红衣的陆绎骑马而来，身后是华丽的八台大桥，轿身上全是娇艳欲滴的红色玫瑰花，呼吸之间都是浓烈的玫瑰花香，可惜现在是冬天，若是春天定会吸引不少的蝴蝶驻足。人群中全都不约而同的发出惊叹：陆大人长得好俊啊！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6ec5248d18d3f94b33c7c07cd7aeb419","author":"秋日黄花","author_id":"","book_id":"7161046727389088802","book_name":"锦衣之谈情说案","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":273,\"name\":\"历史古代\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273\u0026name=历史古代\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7161055125375549952","read_count":"270","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"591537"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"194","tags":"历史古代,历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o2c2d2ec7df33c0997e1fd49b090b7d38~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779468119\u0026x-signature=0eeA8a6%2Bbdpp2QcW6Uz72pAnTCM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1609314502447948","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"702032"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603240041590331E58068254ADBB382\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":30,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_d
